PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION OF SANCTIONS IMPOSED ON ON 10/18/2004 TO KAREN E. KISSLER, ESQ., IN THE AMOUNT OF $350.00 IS SCHEDULED THIS DAY. THERE BEING NO APPEARANCE OR AN OBJECTION TENTATIVE RULING TO GRANT MOTION IS ADOPTED. MOTION IS ORDERED GRANTED. SANCTIONS ARE ORDERED VACATED.
